title: Render job spec
description: The saved, reproducible record of one generation. Written by the Question Guard (see GUARD.md) before any render. paperSize is REQUIRED and must be explicitly confirmed with the user — never silently defaulted.

name.description: Short job name, becomes the output filename slug. e.g. 'spring-menu-launch'

project.description: Project or client name; becomes the first output folder segment. Free text — slugified and validated (no path traversal, no Windows reserved names).

docType.description: Document type, singular. e.g. 'flyer', 'certificate', 'legal-form'. Pluralized to form the second output folder segment.

paperSize.description: ALWAYS explicitly confirmed with the user. letter = 8.5x11in, legal = 8.5x14in.

outputs.description: PDF is the authoritative print output (vector). PNG is a convenience raster deliverable.

dpi.description: PNG resolution. deviceScaleFactor = dpi/96; sharp stamps the pHYs chunk.

colorIntent.description: cmyk triggers the optional Ghostscript press post-step (Phase 4); requires Ghostscript installed.

margin.description: CSS margin for @page, e.g. '0.5in' or '1in 0.75in'. Use '0' for full-bleed designs.

bleed.description: Bleed size, e.g. '0.125in'. Non-zero routes the render through Paged.js (no browser supports @page bleed natively).

cropMarks.description: Draw crop marks. Routes through Paged.js.

template.description: Template file path relative to templates/, e.g. 'poster-letter.html'.

content.description: Values substituted into the template's {{placeholder}} fields.

fonts.description: Font family names from fonts/manifest.json this job uses (informational in v1; templates declare @font-face).

imageSlots.description: Map of slot name -> image path (relative to project root) filling the template's art zones.

variants.description: Optional list of content overrides; each produces an additional render. Auto-open is skipped for batches.
